review_notes: The functions are generally applicable to Kubernetes and map to relevant security controls. However, the naming of the service mesh function needed adjustment for consistency with the naming pattern. The functions are descriptive and indicate clear pass/fail criteria.
naming_improvements: Use 'service' instead of 'service_mesh' for resource name to align with naming conventions
title: Incident Handling | Integrated Incident Response Team
step1_reasoning: The control IR-4 (11) focuses on incident handling and the integration of an incident response team. In Kubernetes, this can be mapped to ensuring that audit logs are enabled and configured to capture security incidents, admission controllers are configured to detect and respond to potential security threats, and service mesh solutions are monitoring traffic for anomalies. These measures help in detecting and responding to incidents within a Kubernetes environment.
